Passive.Name: The Gray Cinderella / The Ashen Monster
Passive.Desc:
At the start of each Wave, heal to 50% Max HP if below, and gain The Gray Cinderella passive.
Once per Wave, upon taking lethal damage, negate it and gain damage immunity for the rest of the Scene instead. When this occurs, recover from Stagger and heal 50% of your Max HP, and change The Gray Cinderella status to The Ashen Monster at the start of the next Scene.
At Emotion Level 2+, add 'Triumphant Pulse' to the Personal E.G.O hand. While in The Ashen Monster form, also add 'Dawnlit Ashen Trail: Cinderella Gray' to your E.G.O hand.
Gain 1 Shin (心) - The Gray Cinderella upon: - Healing 25 HP, - Taking 25 HP worth of damage.
Whenever you have 5 Shin (心) - The Gray Cinderella, expend them to gain 1 Mang (望) - The Gray Cinderella (Up to 2).

Passive.Name: Starlight of Kasamatsu
Passive.Desc: Gain 1 Haste next Scene. If this unit is faster than half of the units on field, gain 3 Haste instead. If the Speed difference between this unit and the target are greater than 3, the target loses Power equal to the Speed difference reduced by 2.

Passive.Name: Monster
Passive.Desc:
At the end of the Scene, take 1% max HP damage. This increases by 1.5% per Scene (max of 12% total, additive). Recover 20% of your Max HP whenever defeating a target.
Unlock Craving Monster / Hungry Monster / Starved Monster status when dropping equal or below 80%/60%/40% of your Max HP, checked at the start of each Scene. Whenever healing above the HP thresholds, there is a scene of grace period to prevent getting said status from being reassigned, after which the status will be downgraded to a lower tier. This does not apply when progressing to an higher tier.
Whenever this unit's current HP is above the thresholds relevant to the statuses mentioned above, deal twice as much Rupture damage, but also take Fixed Damage equal to the amount of the target's Rupture stacks. This damage bypasses Shield.
Gain the following benefits, triggerable up to 3 times per Scene each: - Whenever dealing 3+ Rupture damage at once, gain 1 Poise. - Whenever rolling a Critical Hit, inflict 3 Rupture to the target.

Passive.Name: Undying Flame
Passive.Desc:
Upon taking lethal damage, become briefly immune to all forms of damage and trigger the following:
At the start of the next Scene, recover from Stagger, restore all light, draw 5 cards, and all dice gain +3 Min and Max Power. On the end of that particular Scene, die.

Passive.Name: The Gray Cinderella / The Ashen Monster
Passive.Desc:
At the start of each Act, heal 25% of your Max HP and gain The Gray Cinderella/Ashen Monster passive based on the current phase.
Gain x1.2 the amount of Poise from all sources, rounded up.
Gain 1 Shin (心) - The Gray Cinderella upon: - Hitting a target 5 times, - Killing a target, - Losing 25% of your Max HP.
Permanently gain 1 Mang (望) - The Gray Cinderella and change to the Ashen Monster upon reaching 40% of Max HP. HP does not fall below 40% before this occurs.
Additionally, permanently gain 1 more Mang (望) - The Gray Cinderella and heal up to 50% of Max HP the first time this unit takes lethal damage.
This unit's Undying Flame passive lasts for 2 Scenes instead of 1.

Passive.Name: Indomitable
Passive.Desc:
Take 1 less damage and stagger damage from all sources (Including damage from non-attacks).
Whenever receiving a one-sided attack and the counter queue is empty, there is a chance to respond with [Countermeasures] skill. Every time this is used, inflict 1 Bind on self.

Passive.Name: Indomitable
Passive.Desc:
Receive 1 less damage and stagger damage from all sources (Including damage from non-attacks).
Whenever receiving a one-sided attack and the counter queue is empty, there is a chance to respond with [Countermeasures] skill (Twice per Scene). Every time this is used, inflict 1 Bind on self.
